files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# subagent-stop.sh — SubagentStop hook (synchronous)
+# Fires in the parent session when a subagent completes.
+# Appends a handoff ConversationItem to the parent's cxdb context.
+#
+# PAYLOAD FIELDS: Verify these against a live multi-agent session.
+# Expected: session_id (parent), possibly subagent_session_id, reason.
+set -euo pipefail
+
+source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+resolve_cxdb_url
+
+input=$(cat)
+# session_id here is the PARENT session (SubagentStop fires in parent context)
+session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id')
+context_id=$(get_context_id "$session_id")
+[ -z "$context_id" ] && exit 0
+
+# Try common field names for the subagent session ID (verify with probe)
+subagent_session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.subagent_session_id // .child_session_id // ""')
+reason=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.reason // "completed"')
+ts=$(now_ms)
+
+# Build the to_agent identifier: use subagent context_id if we have it
+to_agent="$subagent_session_id"
+if [ -n "$subagent_session_id" ]; then
+  sub_cid=$(get_context_id "$subagent_session_id")
+  [ -n "$sub_cid" ] && to_agent="context:$sub_cid"
+fi
+
+payload=$(jq -n \
+  --arg from_agent "$session_id" \
+  --arg to_agent "$to_agent" \
+  --arg reason "$reason" \
+  --argjson ts "$ts" \
+  '{
+    "type_id": "cxdb.ConversationItem",
+    "type_version": 3,
+    "data": {
+      "item_type": "handoff",
+      "status": "complete",
+      "timestamp": $ts,
+      "handoff": {
+        "from_agent": $from_agent,
+        "to_agent": $to_agent,
+        "tool_name": "Task",
+        "reason": $reason
+      }
+    }
+  }')
+
+cxdb_append "$context_id" "$payload"
+exit 0
